message:
fix(c_interop): Zig 0.15 compatibility and type fixes

- exception_types.zig: Fix PyUnicodeObject arg type for ValueError
- typeslots.zig: Add @alignCast for all slot function pointer casts
- typeslots.zig: Remove undefined comparison for ob_type
- typeslots.zig: Use direct type vars instead of getter functions
- exceptions.zig: Add @as casts for incref/decref with anytype params
- exceptions.zig: Fix PyTuple_Check c_int to bool comparison
- setobject.zig: Fix [*] to ?* pointer conversion for table
- sysmodule.zig: Use __stderrp extern for stderr on macOS
- pythonrun.zig: Defer globals/locals handling until VM supports it
